title: Actually optimized
description: A simple modpack for modern Minecraft that fixes bugs and makes the game work better on low-end hardware without sacrificing the look.
body:
# Actually optimized

Introducing the "Actually Optimized" modpack for modern Minecraft - where the name says it all!
### This modpack Includes :
- Different bug fixes with the [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) and [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- Huge speed up to the game launch speed thanks to [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) , [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) and [lazy-language-loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-language-loader)
- Better FPS overall thanks to a lot of mods, especially from [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) , [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- and more simple fixes like [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) that fixes Tooltips from running off the screen.

## high refresh rate experience on my 10-year-old dusty laptop
![image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Le62nlBQ/images/9e78f7d2610a0309e23a8be167b8555e6a28d83f.png)
